news.title: Japan Warns of AI 'Claude Mythos' Cyber Risks
news.description: The Japanese government held an emergency meeting with the Bank of Japan and executives from the country's three megabanks to discuss potential risks posed by the new artificial intelligence model 'Claude Mythos' to Japan's financial system. (News On Japan)
